   524→  // ----------------------------------------
   525→  // POSITION UPDATES
   526→  // ----------------------------------------
   527→
   528→  static async updatePositions(positions: { id: string; position: number; stage?: OpportunityStage }[]): Promise<void> {
   529→    const updates = positions.map(({ id, position, stage }) => {
   530→      const updateData: any = { position, updated_at: new Date().toISOString() };
   531→      if (stage) updateData.stage = stage;
   532→      return supabase
   533→        .from('crm_opportunities')
   534→        .update(updateData)
   535→        .eq('id', id);
   536→    });
   537→
   538→    const results = await Promise.all(updates);
   539→    const errors = results.filter(r => r.error);
   540→    if (errors.length > 0) {
   541→      console.error('Errors updating positions:', errors);
   542→      throw errors[0].error;
   543→    }
   544→  }
   545→
   546→  // ----------------------------------------
   547→  // COLD DM PAGINATED (Outreach tab)
   548→  // ----------------------------------------
   549→
   550→  static async getColdDmsPaginated(
   551→    page: number,
   552→    pageSize: number,
   553→    filters: {
   554→      dm_account?: DmAccount;
   555→      bucket?: Bucket;
   556→      bumpRange?: 'none' | '1-2' | '3+';
   557→      searchTerm?: string;
   558→      sortBy?: string;
   559→      sortAsc?: boolean;
   560→      owner_id?: string;
   561→    }
   562→  ): Promise<{ data: SalesPipelineOpportunity[]; count: number }> {
   563→    const from = (page - 1) * pageSize;
   564→    const to = from + pageSize - 1;
   565→
   566→    let query = supabase
   567→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   568→      .select(`
   569→        *,
   570→        affiliate:crm_affiliates(*),
   571→        client:clients!crm_opportunities_client_id_fkey(id, name)
   572→      `, { count: 'exact' })
   573→      .eq('stage', 'cold_dm');
   574→
   575→    // Optional filters
   576→    if (filters.dm_account) {
   577→      query = query.eq('dm_account', filters.dm_account);
   578→    }
   579→    if (filters.bucket) {
   580→      query = query.eq('bucket', filters.bucket);
   581→    }
   582→    if (filters.searchTerm) {
   583→      query = query.ilike('name', `%${filters.searchTerm}%`);
   584→    }
   585→    if (filters.owner_id) {
   586→      query = query.eq('owner_id', filters.owner_id);
   587→    }
   588→    if (filters.bumpRange === 'none') {
   589→      query = query.eq('bump_number', 0);
   590→    } else if (filters.bumpRange === '1-2') {
   591→      query = query.gte('bump_number', 1).lte('bump_number', 2);
   592→    } else if (filters.bumpRange === '3+') {
   593→      query = query.gte('bump_number', 3);
   594→    }
   595→
   596→    // Sorting
   597→    const sortField = filters.sortBy || 'created_at';
   598→    const ascending = filters.sortAsc ?? false;
   599→    query = query.order(sortField, { ascending });
   600→
   601→    // Pagination
   602→    query = query.range(from, to);
   603→
   604→    const { data, error, count } = await query;
   605→
   606→    if (error) {
   607→      console.error('Error fetching cold DMs paginated:', error);
   608→      throw error;
   609→    }
   610→
   611→    return { data: (data || []) as SalesPipelineOpportunity[], count: count || 0 };
   612→  }
   613→
   614→  // ----------------------------------------
   615→  // BULK OPERATIONS
   616→  // ----------------------------------------
   617→
   618→  // ----------------------------------------
   619→  // TEMPERATURE SCORE
   620→  // ----------------------------------------
   621→
   622→  static async recalcTemperature(id: string): Promise<number | null> {
   623→    const { data, error } = await supabase.rpc('calculate_temperature_score', { opp_id: id });
   624→    if (error) {
   625→      console.error('Error recalculating temperature:', error);
   626→      return null;
   627→    }
   628→    return data;
   629→  }
   630→
   631→  static async recalcAllTemperatures(): Promise<number | null> {
   632→    const { data, error } = await supabase.rpc('recalculate_all_temperature_scores');
   633→    if (error) {
   634→      console.error('Error recalculating all temperatures:', error);
   635→      return null;
   636→    }
   637→    return data;
   638→  }
   639→
   640→  // ----------------------------------------
   641→  // BULK OPERATIONS
   642→  // ----------------------------------------
   643→
   644→  static async bulkRecordBump(ids: string[]): Promise<void> {
   645→    await Promise.all(ids.map(id => this.recordBump(id)));
   646→  }
   647→
   648→  static async bulkUpdateStage(ids: string[], stage: SalesPipelineStage): Promise<void> {
   649→    const now = new Date().toISOString();
   650→    const updates = ids.map(id =>
   651→      supabase
   652→        .from('crm_opportunities')
   653→        .update({ stage, updated_at: now })
   654→        .eq('id', id)
   655→    );
   656→
   657→    const results = await Promise.all(updates);
   658→    const errors = results.filter(r => r.error);
   659→    if (errors.length > 0) {
   660→      console.error('Errors in bulk stage update:', errors);
   661→      throw errors[0].error;
   662→    }
   663→  }
   664→
   665→  static async bulkDelete(ids: string[]): Promise<void> {
   666→    const deletes = ids.map(id =>
   667→      supabase
   668→        .from('crm_opportunities')
   669→        .delete()
   670→        .eq('id', id)
   671→    );
   672→
   673→    const results = await Promise.all(deletes);
   674→    const errors = results.filter(r => r.error);
   675→    if (errors.length > 0) {
   676→      console.error('Errors in bulk delete:', errors);
   677→      throw errors[0].error;
   678→    }
   679→  }
   680→
   681→  // ----------------------------------------
   682→  // SALES DM TEMPLATES
   683→  // ----------------------------------------
   684→
   685→  static async getTemplates(): Promise<SalesDmTemplate[]> {
   686→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   687→      .from('sales_dm_templates')
   688→      .select('*')
   689→      .eq('is_active', true)
   690→      .order('stage', { ascending: true })
   691→      .order('sub_type', { ascending: true });
   692→
   693→    if (error) {
   694→      console.error('Error fetching sales DM templates:', error);
   695→      throw error;
   696→    }
   697→    return (data || []) as SalesDmTemplate[];
   698→  }
   699→

Great! Now I have a comprehensive understanding. Let me create a final summary report:

## Exploration Summary: Message Templates Feature

Based on my thorough exploration of the codebase, here's a comprehensive analysis of the message templates feature:

---

## 1. **UI/Page Structure**

The codebase has **two separate template systems**:

### A. **Main Templates Page** (`/app/templates/page.tsx`)
- **Tab-based interface** with two main sections:
  1. **Templates Tab**: View all active message templates
  2. **Learning Examples Tab**: View AI-generated message examples the AI learned from
  
- **Fields displayed per template**:
  - Name, message_type (categorized badge)
  - Content preview (formatted for Telegram)
  - Variables (displayed as badges: `[CLIENT_NAME]`, etc.)
  - Usage count and last used date
  - Copy and View Full buttons

- **Learning Examples section shows**:
  - Client name, message type, whether AI-generated or user-provided
  - Content preview, campaign info
  - User rating (1-5 stars)
  - Edit count, creation date
  - Copy button

### B. **Sales Pipeline Templates Tab** (`/app/crm/sales-pipeline/page.tsx` - Templates tab)
- **Stage-specific templates** for cold DM outreach and bumps
- **Filter pills** for stages: All, Cold DM, Warm, TG Intro, Booked, Discovery Done, Proposal Call, Contract, Bumps
- **Card grid layout** showing:
  - Template name
  - Stage badge (colored by pipeline stage)
  - Sub-type badge (general, initial, follow-up, bump_1/2/3)
  - Content preview
  - Variables display
  - Copy, Edit, Delete buttons

---

## 2. **Database Schema**

The system uses **separate tables** for different purposes:

### Main Templates (Client Messages):
- **`message_templates`**: Pre-built templates with auto-fill variables
  - Fields: `id, name, message_type, subject, content, variables (JSONB), usage_count, last_used_at, is_active, created_by, created_at, updated_at`
  - Supports 9+ message types (initial_outreach, nda_request, kol_list_delivery, final_report, etc.)

- **`client_message_examples`**: Learning database - tracks every AI-generated or user message
  - Fields: `id, user_id, client_id, campaign_id, message_type, content, template_id, was_ai_generated, original_ai_content, user_rating, was_edited, edit_count, was_sent, embedding (vector)`
  - Uses **pgvector (1536-dim)** for semantic similarity search

- **`ai_message_feedback`**: Tracks edits, ratings, and learning
  - Fields: `message_example_id, feedback_type, before_content, after_content, edit_summary, helpful_score, user_comments`

- **`template_usage_analytics`**: Performance metrics per template
  - Fields: `template_id, user_id, generated_count, sent_count, edited_count, average_rating, period_start, period_end`

### Sales DM Templates (Sales Pipeline):
- **`sales_dm_templates`** (referenced in code but not found in migrations - may be dynamically created or in unreferenced migration)
  - Fields: `id, name, stage, sub_type, content, variables[], is_active, created_by, created_at, updated_at`
  - Used for cold DM outreach with stages: cold_dm, warm, tg_intro, booked, discovery_done, proposal_call, v2_contract
  - Sub-types: general, initial, follow_up, bump_1, bump_2, bump_3

---

## 3. **How Templates Are Used in Sales Pipeline Bumps**

**Location of integration**: `/lib/salesPipelineService.ts`

1. **Bump Recording**: `recordBump(oppId)` increments `bump_number` and records timestamp in `crm_opportunities`
2. **Activity Logging**: Creates a "Bump #N" activity entry automatically
3. **Temperature Recalculation**: Adjusts opportunity engagement score after bump

**Templates are accessed for display**:
- Users see available templates in the Sales Pipeline Templates tab
- Templates are **not automatically applied** during bumps - they're shown as reference/copy-paste templates
- Users manually select and copy template content when sending bumps

**Sales Pipeline opportunity fields related to bumps**:
- `bump_number`: Integer tracking count
- `last_bump_date`: ISO timestamp of most recent bump
- `last_contacted_at`: General last contact timestamp

---

## 4. **Tagging/Categorization System**

### Main Templates (Client Messages):
- **`message_type`** (primary categorization): 17+ types include
  - initial_outreach, nda_request, kol_list_access, kol_list_delivery
  - final_kol_picks, post_call_followup, contract_activation
  - activation_day, final_report, activation_inputs, budget_plan
  - outreach_update, finalizing_kols, creator_brief, final_checklist
  - mid_campaign_update, initial_results

- **Auto-tagging with colors** based on message_type (distinct colors per type)

### Sales DM Templates (Sales Pipeline):
- **`stage`**: cold_dm, warm, tg_intro, booked, discovery_done, proposal_call, v2_contract, bump
- **`sub_type`**: general, initial, follow_up, bump_1, bump_2, bump_3
- **Color coding**: By stage (blue for cold_dm, amber for warm, pink for bumps, etc.)

### Learning System Tags:
- **`was_ai_generated`**: Boolean flag
- **`was_sent`**: Boolean flag (only sent messages are used for learning)
- **`user_rating`**: 1-5 star system
- **`was_edited`**: Boolean + `edit_count` tracking

---

## 5. **Service Layer Architecture**

**Main Template Service** (`/lib/messageTemplateService.ts`):
- `getTemplates()`: Fetch all active templates
- `getTemplateByType(messageType)`: Single template lookup
- `fillTemplate(template, variables)`: Variable substitution using `[VAR_NAME]` syntax
- `generateMessage(options)`: Full pipeline - template + variable fill + AI enhancement + vector search
- `saveMessageExample()`: Save with embeddings for learning
- `trackFeedback()`: Record edits, ratings, sent status
- `findSimilarExamples()`: Vector semantic search via `search_similar_messages()` RPC
- `generateEmbedding()`: OpenAI text-embedding-3-small

**Sales Pipeline Service** (`/lib/salesPipelineService.ts`):
- `getTemplates()`: Get all active sales DM templates
- `createTemplate(data)`: Create new template
- `updateTemplate(id, updates)`: Edit existing
- `deleteTemplate(id)`: Remove template

---

## 6. **Key Features & Design Patterns**

✓ **Automatic variable filling**: `[CLIENT_NAME]`, `[PROJECT_NAME]`, `[TGE_LAUNCH]`, etc.  
✓ **Telegram formatting**: Auto-converts markdown to Telegram bold/italic format  
✓ **Learning loop**: Messages marked as sent become AI examples for future generations  
✓ **Vector-based similarity search**: Top 3 similar messages used as context  
✓ **Usage analytics**: Tracks which templates work best  
✓ **RLS protected**: User-scoped access with admin overrides  
✓ **Dual system**: Client-facing templates (AI-powered) + Sales team templates (manual reference)

---

**File locations for key components**:
- `/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/app/templates/page.tsx` - Main template UI
- `/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/lib/messageTemplateService.ts` - Core template logic
- `/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/lib/salesPipelineService.ts` - Sales pipeline templates
- `/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/app/crm/sales-pipeline/page.tsx` (line 5367+) - Sales templates UI
- `/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/sql/migrations/010_add_message_templates_and_learning.sql` - Schema

Good overview. Here are my thoughts on each request:

**1. Tag templates by project/product type** — Makes sense. I'd add a `tags` JSONB array column to `sales_dm_templates` (and optionally `message_templates`). Multi-select tags like "Token Launch", "NFT", "DeFi" etc. Displayed as colored badges on the card. Filter pills at the top to filter by tag. Lightweight and flexible — avoids rigid category hierarchies.

**2. Classification showing where it fits in the conversation (stage/sub-type)** — This already partially exists. Sales DM templates have `stage` and `sub_type` fields (cold_dm, warm, bump_1, etc.). The gap is that the tags from point 1 would add the *product context* layer on top of the existing *stage* layer. So you'd filter by both: "Show me warm-stage templates for Token Launch projects." No new architecture needed, just combining the two filters.

**3. Attach images to templates** — Doable via Supabase Storage. Add an `attachments` JSONB array field (each entry: `{ url, name, type }`). Upload to a `template-attachments` bucket. Show thumbnails on the card and full-size in the preview modal (ties into point 5). Worth noting: if these templates are copy-pasted into Telegram, images would need to be sent separately — so this is more for "show how the message looks in action" reference, not auto-sending.

**4. Use templates directly from project sidebar / bump flow** — This is the highest-impact request. Instead of copy-pasting from a separate tab, a template picker would appear inline when recording a bump or sending a message. Flow: bump button → template picker modal (filtered by stage + project tags) → select → content auto-fills → send/copy. This connects the templates system to the actual workflow. It's also the most complex change — touches the bump flow, activity logging, and potentially the project detail sidebar.

**5. Preview/expand modal instead of just edit/copy** — Simple win. A read-only modal or expandable panel showing the full template content, variables, tags, attached images, and usage stats. Quick to build, big UX improvement. I'd add a click-to-preview on the card itself (not just an explicit button).

**My suggested priority order:**
1. Preview modal (quick win, unblocks usability)
2. Tags (enables filtering, needed before #4)
3. Image attachments (standalone, medium effort)
4. Inline template picker in bump flow (highest value but depends on 2)

// Lines 5367-5652: Complete Templates Tab
<TabsContent value="templates" className="mt-0">
  {(() => {
    const TEMPLATE_STAGES = [
      { value: 'all', label: 'All' },
      { value: 'cold_dm', label: 'Cold DM' },
      { value: 'warm', label: 'Warm' },
      { value: 'tg_intro', label: 'TG Intro' },
      { value: 'booked', label: 'Booked' },
      { value: 'discovery_done', label: 'Discovery Done' },
      { value: 'proposal_call', label: 'Proposal Call' },
      { value: 'v2_contract', label: 'Contract' },
      { value: 'bump', label: 'Bumps' },
    ];

    // Lines 5381-5383: Filter templates by stage
    const filteredTemplates = templateStageFilter === 'all'
      ? templates
      : templates.filter(t => t.stage === templateStageFilter);

    // Helper functions (Lines 5385-5406)
    const getSubTypeLabel = (subType: string) => {
      const labels: Record<string, string> = {
        general: 'General',
        initial: 'Initial',
        bump_1: 'Bump 1',
        bump_2: 'Bump 2',
        bump_3: 'Bump 3',
        follow_up: 'Follow-up',
      };
      return labels[subType] || subType;
    };

    // Copy handler (Lines 5408-5410)
    const handleCopy = async (content: string) => {
      await navigator.clipboard.writeText(content);
    };

    // Create template handler (Lines 5412-5424)
    const handleCreateTemplate = async () => {
      setIsTemplateSubmitting(true);
      try {
        const created = await SalesPipelineService.createTemplate(templateForm);
        setTemplates(prev => [...prev, created]);
        setIsTemplateDialogOpen(false);
        setTemplateForm({ name: '', stage: 'cold_dm', sub_type: 'general', content: '' });
      } catch (err) {
        console.error('Error creating template:', err);
      } finally {
        setIsTemplateSubmitting(false);
      }
    };

    // Update template handler (Lines 5426-5440)
    const handleUpdateTemplate = async () => {
      if (!editingTemplate) return;
      setIsTemplateSubmitting(true);
      try {
        const updated = await SalesPipelineService.updateTemplate(editingTemplate.id, templateForm);
        setTemplates(prev => prev.map(t => t.id === updated.id ? updated : t));
        setEditingTemplate(null);
        setIsTemplateDialogOpen(false);
        setTemplateForm({ name: '', stage: 'cold_dm', sub_type: 'general', content: '' });
      } catch (err) {
        console.error('Error updating template:', err);
      } finally {
        setIsTemplateSubmitting(false);
      }
    };

    // Delete template handler (Lines 5442-5449)
    const handleDeleteTemplate = async (id: string) => {
      try {
        await SalesPipelineService.deleteTemplate(id);
        setTemplates(prev => prev.filter(t => t.id !== id));
      } catch (err) {
        console.error('Error deleting template:', err);
      }
    };

    // Edit/Create dialog openers (Lines 5451-5461)
    const openEditDialog = (t: SalesDmTemplate) => {
      setEditingTemplate(t);
      setTemplateForm({ name: t.name, stage: t.stage, sub_type: t.sub_type, content: t.content, variables: t.variables });
      setIsTemplateDialogOpen(true);
    };

    const openCreateDialog = () => {
      setEditingTemplate(null);
      setTemplateForm({ name: '', stage: 'cold_dm', sub_type: 'general', content: '' });
      setIsTemplateDialogOpen(true);
    };

    // Sub-type options by stage (Lines 5463-5466)
    const getSubTypeOptions = (stage: string) => {
      if (stage === 'bump') return ['bump_1', 'bump_2', 'bump_3'];
      return ['general', 'initial', 'follow_up'];
    };

    return (
      <div className="space-y-4">
        {/* Stage filter pills + New button (Lines 5469-5491) */}
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 flex-wrap">
            {TEMPLATE_STAGES.map(s => (
              <button
                key={s.value}
                onClick={() => setTemplateStageFilter(s.value)}
                className={`px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full text-sm font-medium transition-colors ${
                  templateStageFilter === s.value
                    ? 'bg-[#3e8692] text-white'
                    : 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-200'
                }`}
              >
                {s.label}
              </button>
            ))}
          </div>
          <Button size="sm" onClick={openCreateDialog} style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692' }} className="text-white hover:opacity-90">
            <Plus className="h-4 w-4 mr-1" />
            New Template
          </Button>
        </div>

        {/* Template cards grid (Lines 5493-5561) */}
        {filteredTemplates.length === 0 ? (
          <div className="text-center py-12 text-gray-500">
            <FileText className="h-8 w-8 mx-auto mb-2 opacity-50" />
            <p>No templates found{templateStageFilter !== 'all' ? ' for this stage' : ''}.</p>
          </div>
        ) : (
          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
            {filteredTemplates.map(t => {
              const stageColor = getStageColorForTemplate(t.stage);
              return (
                <Card key={t.id} className="overflow-hidden">
                  <CardContent className="p-4 space-y-3">
                    {/* Header with title and action buttons (Lines 5506-5537) */}
                    <div className="flex items-start justify-between">
                      <h4 className="font-semibold text-sm text-gray-900 line-clamp-1">{t.name}</h4>
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-1 ml-2 flex-shrink-0">
                        {/* Copy button (Lines 5509-5517) */}
                        <Button
                          variant="ghost"
                          size="sm"
                          className="h-7 w-7 p-0"
                          onClick={() => handleCopy(t.content)}
                          title="Copy to clipboard"
                        >
                          <Copy className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
                        </Button>
                        {/* Edit button (Lines 5518-5526) */}
                        <Button
                          variant="ghost"
                          size="sm"
                          className="h-7 w-7 p-0"
                          onClick={() => openEditDialog(t)}
                          title="Edit"
                        >
                          <Edit className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
                        </Button>
                        {/* Delete button (Lines 5527-5535) */}
                        <Button
                          variant="ghost"
                          size="sm"
                          className="h-7 w-7 p-0 text-red-500 hover:text-red-700"
                          onClick={() => handleDeleteTemplate(t.id)}
                          title="Delete"
                        >
                          <Trash2 className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
                        </Button>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                    {/* Stage and Sub-type badges (Lines 5538-5545) */}
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                      <Badge className={`${stageColor.bg} ${stageColor.text} text-xs border-0`}>
                        {getStageLabelForTemplate(t.stage)}
                      </Badge>

                    </div>

                    {t.variables && t.variables.length > 0 && (

                </Card>

        <Dialog open={isTemplateDialogOpen} onOpenChange={(open) => {
          setIsTemplateDialogOpen(open);
          if (!open) { setEditingTemplate(null); setTemplateForm({ name: '', stage: 'cold_dm', sub_type: 'general', content: '' }); }
        }}>
          <DialogContent className="sm:max-w-lg">
            <DialogHeader>
              <DialogTitle>{editingTemplate ? 'Edit Template' : 'New Template'}</DialogTitle>
              <DialogDescription>
                {editingTemplate ? 'Update this sales DM template.' : 'Create a new stage-specific DM template.'}
              </DialogDescription>
            </DialogHeader>
            <div className="space-y-4">
              <div>
                <Label>Name</Label>
                <Input
                  value={templateForm.name}
                  onChange={e => setTemplateForm(prev => ({ ...prev, name: e.target.value }))}
                  placeholder="e.g., Cold DM — Initial Outreach"
                  className="auth-input"
                />
              </div>
              <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                <div>
                  <Label>Stage</Label>
                  <Select
                    value={templateForm.stage}
                    onValueChange={v => setTemplateForm(prev => ({
                      ...prev,
                      stage: v,
                      sub_type: v === 'bump' ? 'bump_1' : 'general',
                    }))}
                  >
                    <SelectTrigger className="auth-input"><SelectValue /></SelectTrigger>
                    <SelectContent>
                      <SelectItem value="cold_dm">Cold DM</SelectItem>
                      <SelectItem value="warm">Warm</SelectItem>
                      <SelectItem value="tg_intro">TG Intro</SelectItem>
                      <SelectItem value="booked">Booked</SelectItem>
                      <SelectItem value="discovery_done">Discovery Done</SelectItem>

                      ))}

                </div>
              </div>
              <div>
                <Label>Content</Label>
                <Textarea
                  value={templateForm.content}
                  onChange={e => setTemplateForm(prev => ({ ...prev, content: e.target.value }))}
                  placeholder="Write your template here... Use [KOL_NAME], [PROJECT_NAME], etc. as placeholders."
                  rows={6}
                  className="auth-input"
                />
              </div>
            </div>
            <DialogFooter>
              <Button variant="outline" onClick={() => setIsTemplateDialogOpen(false)}>Cancel</Button>
              <Button
                onClick={editingTemplate ? handleUpdateTemplate : handleCreateTemplate}
                disabled={isTemplateSubmitting || !templateForm.name || !templateForm.content}
                style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692' }}

                {editingTemplate ? 'Save Changes' : 'Create Template'}
              </Button>
            </DialogFooter>
          </DialogContent>
        </Dialog>
      </div>
    );
  })()}
</TabsContent>

### 3. SalesPipelineService Template Methods (Lines 685-735)

```typescript
// Lines 685-698: Get all active templates
static async getTemplates(): Promise<SalesDmTemplate[]> {
  const { data, error } = await supabase
    .from('sales_dm_templates')
    .select('*')
    .eq('is_active', true)
    .order('stage', { ascending: true })
    .order('sub_type', { ascending: true });

  if (error) {
    console.error('Error fetching sales DM templates:', error);
    throw error;
  }
  return (data || []) as SalesDmTemplate[];
}

// Lines 700-714: Create new template
static async createTemplate(templateData: CreateSalesDmTemplateData): Promise<SalesDmTemplate> {
  const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser();

  const { data, error } = await supabase
    .from('sales_dm_templates')
    .insert([{
      ...templateData,
      created_by: user?.id || null,
    }])
    .select()
    .single();

  if (error) throw error;
  return data as SalesDmTemplate;
}

// Lines 716-726: Update template
static async updateTemplate(id: string, updates: Partial<CreateSalesDmTemplateData>): Promise<SalesDmTemplate> {
  const { data, error } = await supabase
    .from('sales_dm_templates')
    .update({ ...updates, updated_at: new Date().toISOString() })
    .eq('id', id)
    .select()
    .single();

  if (error) throw error;
  return data as SalesDmTemplate;
}

// Lines 728-735: Delete template
static async deleteTemplate(id: string): Promise<void> {
  const { error } = await supabase
    .from('sales_dm_templates')
    .delete()
    .eq('id', id);

  if (error) throw error;
}
```

### 4. Database Schema for `sales_dm_templates`

**Table Columns (inferred from interface & service):**
- `id` (UUID, primary key)
- `name` (TEXT, not null)
- `stage` (TEXT, not null)
- `sub_type` (TEXT)
- `content` (TEXT)
- `variables` (array of strings)
- `is_active` (BOOLEAN)
- `created_by` (UUID, references auth.users)
- `created_at` (TIMESTAMP)
- `updated_at` (TIMESTAMP)

The page has several established dialog patterns you can model a preview modal after:

**Pattern 1: Simple Prompt Dialog (Lines 4541-4571 - Orbit Prompt)**
```typescript
const renderOrbitPrompt = () => (
  <Dialog open={!!orbitPrompt} onOpenChange={open => { if (!open) setOrbitPrompt(null); }}>
    <DialogContent className="sm:max-w-sm z-[80]">
      <DialogHeader>
        <DialogTitle>Move to Orbit</DialogTitle>
        <DialogDescription>Select the reason for moving this opportunity to orbit.</DialogDescription>
      </DialogHeader>
      {/* Content */}
      <DialogFooter>
        <Button variant="outline" onClick={() => setOrbitPrompt(null)}>Cancel</Button>
        <Button onClick={confirmOrbit} style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692' }}>Confirm</Button>
      </DialogFooter>
    </DialogContent>
  </Dialog>
);
```

**Pattern 2: Modal with Popover/Combobox (Lines 4593-4685 - Closed Won Prompt)**
- Uses `Popover`, `Command`, `CommandInput`, `CommandList` for complex selection
- Shows both "new" and "existing" modes
- Template dialog already follows this pattern at lines 5568-5648

**Pattern 3: Required State Structure for Preview Modal:**
```typescript
const [templatePreviewPrompt, setTemplatePreviewPrompt] = useState<{ 
  templateId: string; 
  templateName: string; 
  templateContent: string; 
} | null>(null);

      </div>
      <DialogFooter>
        <Button onClick={() => setTemplatePreviewPrompt(null)}>Close</Button>
      </DialogFooter>
    </DialogContent>
  </Dialog>
);
```

**Z-index Pattern:** All modals use `z-[80]` or no explicit z-index (DialogContent handles it)

   196→
   197→// ============================================
   198→// Sales Pipeline Service
   199→// ============================================
   200→
   201→export class SalesPipelineService {
   202→  // ----------------------------------------
   203→  // OPPORTUNITIES
   204→  // ----------------------------------------
   205→
   206→  static async getAll(): Promise<SalesPipelineOpportunity[]> {
   207→    // Supabase defaults to 1000 rows — paginate to fetch all
   208→    const pageSize = 1000;
   209→    let allData: SalesPipelineOpportunity[] = [];
   210→    let from = 0;
   211→    let hasMore = true;
   212→
   213→    while (hasMore) {
   214→      const { data, error } = await supabase
   215→        .from('crm_opportunities')
   216→        .select(`
   217→          *,
   218→          affiliate:crm_affiliates(*),
   219→          client:clients!crm_opportunities_client_id_fkey(id, name)
   220→        `)
   221→        .in('stage', ALL_V2_STAGES)
   222→        .order('position', { ascending: true })
   223→        .order('created_at', { ascending: false })
   224→        .range(from, from + pageSize - 1);
   225→
   226→      if (error) {
   227→        console.error('Error fetching sales pipeline opportunities:', error);
   228→        throw error;
   229→      }
   230→
   231→      allData = allData.concat((data || []) as SalesPipelineOpportunity[]);
   232→      hasMore = (data?.length || 0) === pageSize;
   233→      from += pageSize;
   234→    }
   235→
   236→    return allData;
   237→  }
   238→
   239→  static async create(data: CreateSalesPipelineOpportunityData): Promise<SalesPipelineOpportunity> {
   240→    // Dedup check: name + tg_handle
   241→    if (data.name && data.tg_handle) {
   242→      const dedupKey = `${data.name.toLowerCase().trim()}::${data.tg_handle.toLowerCase().trim()}`;
   243→      const { data: existing } = await supabase
   244→        .from('crm_opportunities')
   245→        .select('id')
   246→        .eq('dedup_key', dedupKey)
   247→        .maybeSingle();
   248→
   249→      if (existing) {
   250→        throw new Error('A deal with this name and TG handle already exists');
   251→      }
   252→
   253→      (data as any).dedup_key = dedupKey;
   254→    }
   255→
   256→    const insertData = {
   257→      ...data,
   258→      stage: data.stage || 'cold_dm',
   259→    };
   260→
   261→    const { data: created, error } = await supabase
   262→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   263→      .insert([insertData])
   264→      .select()
   265→      .single();
   266→
   267→    if (error) throw error;
   268→
   269→    // Record stage history
   270→    await CRMService.recordStageHistory('opportunity', created.id, null, insertData.stage || 'cold_dm');
   271→
   272→    // Auto-calculate temperature score
   273→    await this.recalcTemperature(created.id);
   274→
   275→    return created as SalesPipelineOpportunity;
   276→  }
   277→
   278→  static async update(
   279→    id: string,
   280→    updates: Partial<CreateSalesPipelineOpportunityData> & {
   281→      warm_sub_state?: WarmSubState | null;
   282→      orbit_reason?: OrbitReason | null;
   283→      orbit_followup_days?: number;
   284→      closed_lost_reason?: string | null;
   285→      next_meeting_at?: string | null;
   286→      next_meeting_type?: string | null;
   287→      bump_number?: number;
   288→      last_bump_date?: string | null;
   289→      bucket?: Bucket | null;
   290→      calendly_sent_via?: CalendlySentVia;
   291→      calendly_sent_date?: string | null;
   292→      calendly_booked_date?: string | null;
   293→      gc_opened?: string;
   294→      client_id?: string | null;
   295→    }
   296→  ): Promise<SalesPipelineOpportunity> {
   297→    // Get current state for stage history
   298→    const { data: current } = await supabase
   299→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   300→      .select('*')
   301→      .eq('id', id)
   302→      .single();
   303→
   304→    const updateData: any = { ...updates, updated_at: new Date().toISOString() };
   305→
   306→    // Auto-set timestamps on stage transitions
   307→    if (updates.stage && current) {
   308→      if (updates.stage === 'discovery_done' && !current.discovery_call_at) {
   309→        updateData.discovery_call_at = new Date().toISOString();
   310→      }
   311→      if (updates.stage === 'proposal_sent' && !current.proposal_sent_at) {
   312→        updateData.proposal_sent_at = new Date().toISOString();
   313→      }
   314→      if ((updates.stage === 'v2_closed_won' || updates.stage === 'v2_closed_lost') && !current.closed_at) {
   315→        updateData.closed_at = new Date().toISOString();
   316→      }
   317→    }
   318→
   319→    // Auto-set bucket_changed_at
   320→    if (updates.bucket && current && updates.bucket !== current.bucket) {
   321→      updateData.bucket_changed_at = new Date().toISOString();
   322→    }
   323→
   324→    const { data: updated, error } = await supabase
   325→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   326→      .update(updateData)
   327→      .eq('id', id)
   328→      .select()
   329→      .single();
   330→
   331→    if (error) throw error;
   332→
   333→    // Record stage change
   334→    if (updates.stage && current && current.stage !== updates.stage) {
   335→      await CRMService.recordStageHistory('opportunity', id, current.stage, updates.stage);
   336→    }
   337→
   338→    // Recalculate temperature score after stage/bucket/key field changes
   339→    await this.recalcTemperature(id);
   340→
   341→    return updated as SalesPipelineOpportunity;
   342→  }
   343→
   344→  static async delete(id: string): Promise<void> {
   345→    const { error } = await supabase
   346→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   347→      .delete()
   348→      .eq('id', id);
   349→
   350→    if (error) throw error;
   351→  }
   352→
   353→  // ----------------------------------------
   354→  // BUMPS
   355→  // ----------------------------------------
   356→
   357→  static async recordBump(id: string): Promise<SalesPipelineOpportunity> {
   358→    const { data: current } = await supabase
   359→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   360→      .select('bump_number')
   361→      .eq('id', id)
   362→      .single();
   363→
   364→    const newBumpNumber = (current?.bump_number || 0) + 1;
   365→
   366→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   367→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   368→      .update({
   369→        bump_number: newBumpNumber,
   370→        last_bump_date: new Date().toISOString(),
   371→        last_contacted_at: new Date().toISOString(),
   372→        updated_at: new Date().toISOString(),
   373→      })
   374→      .eq('id', id)
   375→      .select()
   376→      .single();
   377→
   378→    if (error) throw error;
   379→
   380→    // Also create a bump activity
   381→    await this.createActivity({
   382→      opportunity_id: id,
   383→      type: 'bump',
   384→      title: `Bump #${newBumpNumber}`,
   385→    });
   386→
   387→    // Recalculate temperature score
   388→    await this.recalcTemperature(id);
   389→
   390→    return data as SalesPipelineOpportunity;
   391→  }
   392→
   393→  static async reduceBump(id: string): Promise<SalesPipelineOpportunity> {
   394→    const { data: current } = await supabase
   395→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   396→      .select('bump_number')
   397→      .eq('id', id)
   398→      .single();
   399→
   400→    const newBumpNumber = Math.max((current?.bump_number || 0) - 1, 0);
   401→
   402→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   403→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   404→      .update({
   405→        bump_number: newBumpNumber,
   406→        updated_at: new Date().toISOString(),
   407→      })
   408→      .eq('id', id)
   409→      .select()
   410→      .single();
   411→
   412→    if (error) throw error;
   413→    return data as SalesPipelineOpportunity;
   414→  }
   415→
   416→  // ----------------------------------------
   417→  // ACTIVITIES
   418→  // ----------------------------------------
   419→
   420→  static async getActivities(opportunityId: string): Promise<CRMActivity[]> {
   421→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   422→      .from('crm_activities')
   423→      .select('*')
   424→      .eq('opportunity_id', opportunityId)
   425→      .order('created_at', { ascending: false });
   426→
   427→    if (error) throw error;
   428→    return data || [];
   429→  }
   430→
   431→  static async createActivity(activityData: CreateActivityData): Promise<CRMActivity> {
   432→    const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser();
   433→
   434→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   435→      .from('crm_activities')
   436→      .insert([{
   437→        ...activityData,
   438→        owner_id: user?.id || null,
   439→      }])
   440→      .select()
   441→      .single();
   442→
   443→    if (error) throw error;
   444→
   445→    // Recalculate temperature score (new activity affects engagement)
   446→    await this.recalcTemperature(activityData.opportunity_id);
   447→
   448→    return data;
   449→  }
   450→
   451→  // ----------------------------------------
   452→  // BAMFAM VIOLATIONS
   453→  // ----------------------------------------
   454→
   455→  static async getBAMFAMViolations(): Promise<SalesPipelineOpportunity[]> {
   456→    // BAMFAM: past discovery_done with no next_meeting or overdue next_meeting
   457→    const postDiscoveryStages: SalesPipelineStage[] = [
   458→      'discovery_done', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract',
   459→    ];
   460→
   461→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   462→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   463→      .select(`
   464→        *,
   465→        affiliate:crm_affiliates(*),
   466→        client:clients!crm_opportunities_client_id_fkey(id, name)
   467→      `)
   468→      .in('stage', postDiscoveryStages)
   469→      .or('next_meeting_at.is.null,next_meeting_at.lt.' + new Date().toISOString());
   470→
   471→    if (error) throw error;
   472→    return (data || []) as SalesPipelineOpportunity[];
   473→  }
   474→
   475→  // ----------------------------------------
   476→  // STAGES HELPER
   477→  // ----------------------------------------
   478→
   479→  static getAvailableStages(dmAccount: DmAccount): SalesPipelineStage[] {
   480→    if (dmAccount === 'closer') return PATH_A_STAGES;
   481→    return PATH_B_STAGES;
   482→  }
   483→
   484→  // ----------------------------------------
   485→  // METRICS
   486→  // ----------------------------------------
   487→
   488→  static async getMetrics(): Promise<{
   489→    totalCount: number;
   490→    bucketA: number;
   491→    bucketB: number;
   492→    bucketC: number;
   493→    activeValue: number;
   494→    bamfamViolations: number;
   495→  }> {
   496→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   497→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   498→      .select('stage, bucket, deal_value, next_meeting_at')
   499→      .in('stage', ALL_V2_STAGES);
   500→
   501→    if (error) throw error;
   502→
   503→    const opps = data || [];
   504→    const activeStages = PIPELINE_STAGES;
   505→    const active = opps.filter(o => activeStages.includes(o.stage as SalesPipelineStage));
   506→
   507→    const postDiscovery = ['discovery_done', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract'];
   508→    const now = new Date().toISOString();
   509→    const bamfam = opps.filter(o =>
   510→      postDiscovery.includes(o.stage) &&
   511→      (!o.next_meeting_at || o.next_meeting_at < now)
   512→    );
   513→
   514→    return {
   515→      totalCount: opps.length,
   516→      bucketA: opps.filter(o => o.bucket === 'A').length,
   517→      bucketB: opps.filter(o => o.bucket === 'B').length,
   518→      bucketC: opps.filter(o => o.bucket === 'C').length,
   519→      activeValue: active.reduce((sum, o) => sum + (o.deal_value || 0), 0),
   520→      bamfamViolations: bamfam.length,
   521→    };
   522→  }
   523→
   524→  // ----------------------------------------
   525→  // POSITION UPDATES
   526→  // ----------------------------------------
   527→
   528→  static async updatePositions(positions: { id: string; position: number; stage?: OpportunityStage }[]): Promise<void> {
   529→    const updates = positions.map(({ id, position, stage }) => {
   530→      const updateData: any = { position, updated_at: new Date().toISOString() };
   531→      if (stage) updateData.stage = stage;
   532→      return supabase
   533→        .from('crm_opportunities')
   534→        .update(updateData)
   535→        .eq('id', id);
   536→    });
   537→
   538→    const results = await Promise.all(updates);
   539→    const errors = results.filter(r => r.error);
   540→    if (errors.length > 0) {
   541→      console.error('Errors updating positions:', errors);
   542→      throw errors[0].error;
   543→    }
   544→  }
   545→
   546→  // ----------------------------------------
   547→  // COLD DM PAGINATED (Outreach tab)
   548→  // ----------------------------------------
   549→
   550→  static async getColdDmsPaginated(
   551→    page: number,
   552→    pageSize: number,
   553→    filters: {
   554→      dm_account?: DmAccount;
   555→      bucket?: Bucket;
   556→      bumpRange?: 'none' | '1-2' | '3+';
   557→      searchTerm?: string;
   558→      sortBy?: string;
   559→      sortAsc?: boolean;
   560→      owner_id?: string;
   561→    }
   562→  ): Promise<{ data: SalesPipelineOpportunity[]; count: number }> {
   563→    const from = (page - 1) * pageSize;
   564→    const to = from + pageSize - 1;
   565→
   566→    let query = supabase
   567→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   568→      .select(`
   569→        *,
   570→        affiliate:crm_affiliates(*),
   571→        client:clients!crm_opportunities_client_id_fkey(id, name)
   572→      `, { count: 'exact' })
   573→      .eq('stage', 'cold_dm');
   574→
   575→    // Optional filters
   576→    if (filters.dm_account) {
   577→      query = query.eq('dm_account', filters.dm_account);
   578→    }
   579→    if (filters.bucket) {
   580→      query = query.eq('bucket', filters.bucket);
   581→    }
   582→    if (filters.searchTerm) {
   583→      query = query.ilike('name', `%${filters.searchTerm}%`);
   584→    }
   585→    if (filters.owner_id) {
   586→      query = query.eq('owner_id', filters.owner_id);
   587→    }
   588→    if (filters.bumpRange === 'none') {
   589→      query = query.eq('bump_number', 0);
   590→    } else if (filters.bumpRange === '1-2') {
   591→      query = query.gte('bump_number', 1).lte('bump_number', 2);
   592→    } else if (filters.bumpRange === '3+') {
   593→      query = query.gte('bump_number', 3);
   594→    }
   595→
   596→    // Sorting
   597→    const sortField = filters.sortBy || 'created_at';
   598→    const ascending = filters.sortAsc ?? false;
   599→    query = query.order(sortField, { ascending });
   600→
   601→    // Pagination
   602→    query = query.range(from, to);
   603→
   604→    const { data, error, count } = await query;
   605→
   606→    if (error) {
   607→      console.error('Error fetching cold DMs paginated:', error);
   608→      throw error;
   609→    }
   610→
   611→    return { data: (data || []) as SalesPipelineOpportunity[], count: count || 0 };
   612→  }
   613→
   614→  // ----------------------------------------
   615→  // BULK OPERATIONS
   616→  // ----------------------------------------
   617→
   618→  // ----------------------------------------
   619→  // TEMPERATURE SCORE
   620→  // ----------------------------------------
   621→
   622→  static async recalcTemperature(id: string): Promise<number | null> {
   623→    const { data, error } = await supabase.rpc('calculate_temperature_score', { opp_id: id });
   624→    if (error) {
   625→      console.error('Error recalculating temperature:', error);
   626→      return null;
   627→    }
   628→    return data;
   629→  }
   630→
   631→  static async recalcAllTemperatures(): Promise<number | null> {
   632→    const { data, error } = await supabase.rpc('recalculate_all_temperature_scores');
   633→    if (error) {
   634→      console.error('Error recalculating all temperatures:', error);
   635→      return null;
   636→    }
   637→    return data;
   638→  }
   639→
   640→  // ----------------------------------------
   641→  // BULK OPERATIONS
   642→  // ----------------------------------------
   643→
   644→  static async bulkRecordBump(ids: string[]): Promise<void> {
   645→    await Promise.all(ids.map(id => this.recordBump(id)));
   646→  }
   647→
   648→  static async bulkUpdateStage(ids: string[], stage: SalesPipelineStage): Promise<void> {
   649→    const now = new Date().toISOString();
   650→    const updates = ids.map(id =>
   651→      supabase
   652→        .from('crm_opportunities')
   653→        .update({ stage, updated_at: now })
   654→        .eq('id', id)
   655→    );
   656→
   657→    const results = await Promise.all(updates);
   658→    const errors = results.filter(r => r.error);
   659→    if (errors.length > 0) {
   660→      console.error('Errors in bulk stage update:', errors);
   661→      throw errors[0].error;
   662→    }
   663→  }
   664→
   665→  static async bulkDelete(ids: string[]): Promise<void> {
   666→    const deletes = ids.map(id =>
   667→      supabase
   668→        .from('crm_opportunities')
   669→        .delete()
   670→        .eq('id', id)
   671→    );
   672→
   673→    const results = await Promise.all(deletes);
   674→    const errors = results.filter(r => r.error);
   675→    if (errors.length > 0) {
   676→      console.error('Errors in bulk delete:', errors);
   677→      throw errors[0].error;
   678→    }
   679→  }
   680→
   681→  // ----------------------------------------
   682→  // SALES DM TEMPLATES
   683→  // ----------------------------------------
   684→
   685→  static async getTemplates(): Promise<SalesDmTemplate[]> {
   686→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   687→      .from('sales_dm_templates')
   688→      .select('*')
   689→      .eq('is_active', true)

   692→
   693→    if (error) {

   695→      throw error;

   698→  }
   699→
   700→  static async createTemplate(templateData: CreateSalesDmTemplateData): Promise<SalesDmTemplate> {
   701→    const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser();
   702→
   703→    const { data, error } = await supabase

   715→

   717→    const { data, error } = await supabase

     1→-- CRM Database Schema
     2→-- Core Tables: Opportunities (Leads+Deals), Partners, Affiliates, Contacts
     3→-- Supporting: Stage History for analytics
     4→
     5→-- ============================================
     6→-- 1. AFFILIATES TABLE (created first for FK reference)
     7→-- KOLs, referrers with rev-share or commission
     8→-- Lifecycle: New → Active → Inactive
     9→-- ============================================
    10→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS crm_affiliates (
    11→  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    12→
    13→  -- Basic Info
    14→  name TEXT NOT NULL,
    15→  affiliation TEXT, -- Their affiliation/company
    16→  category TEXT, -- Type of affiliate
    17→
    18→  -- Lifecycle
    19→  status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'new', -- 'new', 'active', 'inactive'
    20→
    21→  -- Commission
    22→  commission_model TEXT, -- Description of commission/rev-share structure
    23→  commission_rate DECIMAL, -- Percentage if applicable
    24→
    25→  -- Tracking
    26→  last_contacted_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
    27→
    28→  -- Ownership
    29→  owner_id UUID REFERENCES auth.users(id),
    30→
    31→  -- Point of Contact (inline)
    32→  poc_name TEXT,
    33→  poc_email TEXT,
    34→  poc_telegram TEXT,
    35→
    36→  -- Notes
    37→  notes TEXT,
    38→
    39→  -- Timestamps
    40→  created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
    41→  updated_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW()
    42→);
    43→
    44→-- ============================================
    45→-- 2. OPPORTUNITIES TABLE (Unified Leads + Deals)
    46→-- Single pipeline: New → Contacted → Qualified → Proposal → Contract → Closed
    47→-- ============================================
    48→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS crm_opportunities (
    49→  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    50→
    51→  -- Basic Info
    52→  name TEXT NOT NULL,
    53→
    54→  -- Pipeline Stage (unified lead + deal stages)
    55→  stage TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'new',
    56→  -- Lead stages: 'new', 'contacted', 'qualified', 'unqualified', 'nurture'
    57→  -- Deal stages: 'proposal', 'contract', 'closed_won', 'closed_lost'
    58→
    59→  -- Classification
    60→  account_type TEXT, -- 'general', 'channel', 'campaign', 'lite', 'ad_hoc' (set when qualified)
    61→
    62→  -- Value (set when becomes a deal)
    63→  deal_value DECIMAL,
    64→  currency TEXT DEFAULT 'USD',
    65→
    66→  -- Tracking
    67→  last_contacted_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
    68→
    69→  -- Ownership & Source
    70→  owner_id UUID REFERENCES auth.users(id),
    71→  source TEXT, -- 'referral', 'inbound', 'event', 'cold_outreach'
    72→  referrer TEXT, -- Who referred them
    73→
    74→  -- Communication
    75→  gc TEXT, -- Group Chat link/info
    76→
    77→  -- Affiliate connection (for commission tracking)
    78→  affiliate_id UUID REFERENCES crm_affiliates(id),
    79→
    80→  -- Notes
    81→  notes TEXT,
    82→
    83→  -- Timestamps
    84→  created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
    85→  updated_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
    86→  qualified_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE, -- When moved from lead to deal stage
    87→  closed_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE -- When won or lost
    88→);
    89→
    90→-- ============================================
    91→-- 3. PARTNERS TABLE
    92→-- BD relationships, cross-partnerships
    93→-- Lifecycle: Active / Inactive
    94→-- ============================================
    95→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS crm_partners (
    96→  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    97→
    98→  -- Basic Info
    99→  name TEXT NOT NULL,
   100→
   101→  -- Classification
   102→  category TEXT, -- 'service_provider', 'investor_vc', 'project', 'individual'
   103→  focus TEXT, -- Area of focus/expertise
   104→
   105→  -- Lifecycle
   106→  status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active', -- 'active', 'inactive'
   107→
   108→  -- Tracking
   109→  last_contacted_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
   110→
   111→  -- Ownership
   112→  owner_id UUID REFERENCES auth.users(id),
   113→
   114→  -- Point of Contact (inline)
   115→  poc_name TEXT,
   116→  poc_email TEXT,
   117→  poc_telegram TEXT,
   118→
   119→  -- Affiliate connection (if partner is also an affiliate)
   120→  is_affiliate BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
   121→  affiliate_id UUID REFERENCES crm_affiliates(id),
   122→
   123→  -- Notes
   124→  notes TEXT,
   125→
   126→  -- Timestamps
   127→  created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
   128→  updated_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW()
   129→);
   130→
   131→-- ============================================
   132→-- 4. CONTACTS TABLE
   133→-- Individual people linked to opportunities/partners/affiliates
   134→-- ============================================
   135→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS crm_contacts (
   136→  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
   137→
   138→  -- Basic Info
   139→  name TEXT NOT NULL,
   140→  email TEXT,
   141→  telegram_id TEXT,
   142→  x_id TEXT,
   143→  role TEXT, -- Their role/title
   144→  category TEXT, -- Contact category
   145→
   146→  -- Ownership
   147→  owner_id UUID REFERENCES auth.users(id),
   148→
   149→  -- Notes
   150→  notes TEXT,
   151→
   152→  -- Timestamps
   153→  created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
   154→  updated_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW()
   155→);
   156→
   157→-- ============================================
   158→-- 5. CONTACT LINKS (Junction Table)
   159→-- Links contacts to opportunities/partners/affiliates
   160→-- ============================================
   161→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS crm_contact_links (
   162→  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
   163→  contact_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES crm_contacts(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
   164→
   165→  -- Linked object type and ID
   166→  linked_type TEXT NOT NULL, -- 'opportunity', 'partner', 'affiliate'
   167→  opportunity_id UUID REFERENCES crm_opportunities(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
   168→  partner_id UUID REFERENCES crm_partners(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
   169→  affiliate_id UUID REFERENCES crm_affiliates(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
   170→
   171→  -- Role in this relationship
   172→  role TEXT,
   173→  is_primary BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
   174→
   175→  created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
   176→
   177→  -- Ensure only one link type is set
   178→  CONSTRAINT check_single_link CHECK (
   179→    (CASE WHEN opportunity_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END +
   180→     CASE WHEN partner_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END +
   181→     CASE WHEN affiliate_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 1
   182→  )
   183→);
   184→
   185→-- ============================================
   186→-- 6. STAGE HISTORY (For Analytics)
   187→-- Tracks all stage changes for conversion/velocity analysis
   188→-- ============================================
   189→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS crm_stage_history (
   190→  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
   191→
   192→  -- Object reference
   193→  object_type TEXT NOT NULL, -- 'opportunity', 'partner', 'affiliate'
   194→  object_id UUID NOT NULL,
   195→
   196→  -- Stage change
   197→  from_stage TEXT,
   198→  to_stage TEXT NOT NULL,
   199→
   200→  -- Who and when
   201→  changed_by UUID REFERENCES auth.users(id),
   202→  changed_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
   203→
   204→  notes TEXT
   205→);
   206→
   207→-- ============================================
   208→-- INDEXES
   209→-- ============================================
   210→
   211→-- Opportunities
   212→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_opportunities_stage ON crm_opportunities(stage);
   213→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_opportunities_owner ON crm_opportunities(owner_id);
   214→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_opportunities_source ON crm_opportunities(source);
   215→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_opportunities_affiliate ON crm_opportunities(affiliate_id);
   216→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_opportunities_created ON crm_opportunities(created_at);
   217→
   218→-- Partners
   219→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_partners_status ON crm_partners(status);
   220→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_partners_category ON crm_partners(category);
   221→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_partners_owner ON crm_partners(owner_id);
   222→
   223→-- Affiliates
   224→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_affiliates_status ON crm_affiliates(status);
   225→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_affiliates_category ON crm_affiliates(category);
   226→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_affiliates_owner ON crm_affiliates(owner_id);
   227→
   228→-- Contacts
   229→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_contacts_owner ON crm_contacts(owner_id);
   230→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_contacts_email ON crm_contacts(email);
   231→
   232→-- Contact links
   233→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_contact_links_contact ON crm_contact_links(contact_id);
   234→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_contact_links_opportunity ON crm_contact_links(opportunity_id);
   235→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_contact_links_partner ON crm_contact_links(partner_id);
   236→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_contact_links_affiliate ON crm_contact_links(affiliate_id);
   237→
   238→-- Stage history
   239→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_stage_history_object ON crm_stage_history(object_type, object_id);
   240→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_stage_history_changed ON crm_stage_history(changed_at);
   241→
   242→-- ============================================
   243→-- COMMENTS
   244→-- ============================================
   245→
   246→COMMENT ON TABLE crm_opportunities IS 'Unified sales pipeline: Leads (new/contacted/qualified) → Deals (proposal/contract/closed). Single entity journey.';
   247→COMMENT ON TABLE crm_partners IS 'BD relationships. Categories: service_provider, investor_vc, project, individual. Can also be affiliates.';
   248→COMMENT ON TABLE crm_affiliates IS 'KOLs and referrers with commission/rev-share. Lifecycle: new → active → inactive.';
   249→COMMENT ON TABLE crm_contacts IS 'Individual people who can be linked to multiple CRM objects.';
   250→COMMENT ON TABLE crm_contact_links IS 'Links contacts to opportunities, partners, or affiliates with role info.';
   251→COMMENT ON TABLE crm_stage_history IS 'Audit trail of all stage changes for analytics (conversion rates, velocity).';
   252→
```
</details></tool-use>

    99→    opacity: isDragging ? 0.5 : 1,
   100→  };
   101→  return (
   102→    <div ref={setNodeRef} style={style} {...attributes} {...listeners}>

   107→

   294→
   295→  // ============================================
   296→  // Dashboard Metrics (computed from opportunities)
   297→  // ============================================
   298→
   299→  const dashboardMetrics = useMemo(() => {
   300→    const all = opportunities;
   301→    const pipelineActive = all.filter(o => PIPELINE_STAGES.includes(o.stage as SalesPipelineStage));
   302→    const closedWon = all.filter(o => o.stage === 'v2_closed_won');
   303→    const closedLost = all.filter(o => o.stage === 'v2_closed_lost');
   304→    const inOrbit = all.filter(o => o.stage === 'orbit');
   305→
   306→    // Stages past cold_dm = responded
   307→    const pastColdDm = all.filter(o => o.stage !== 'cold_dm');
   308→    const coldDmCount = outreachTotal > 0 ? outreachTotal : all.filter(o => o.stage === 'cold_dm').length;
   309→    const totalDmsSent = all.length; // every opp started as a DM
   310→    const responseRate = totalDmsSent > 0 ? (pastColdDm.length / totalDmsSent) * 100 : 0;
   311→
   312→    // Meetings booked = in booked or any stage after it
   313→    const bookedAndBeyond = ['booked', 'discovery_done', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract', 'v2_closed_won'];
   314→    const meetingsBooked = all.filter(o => bookedAndBeyond.includes(o.stage)).length;
   315→
   316→    // Discovery calls = in discovery_done or later
   317→    const discoveryAndBeyond = ['discovery_done', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract', 'v2_closed_won'];
   318→    const discoveryCalls = all.filter(o => discoveryAndBeyond.includes(o.stage)).length;
   319→
   320→    // Close rate = won / (won + lost)
   321→    const totalClosed = closedWon.length + closedLost.length;
   322→    const closeRate = totalClosed > 0 ? (closedWon.length / totalClosed) * 100 : 0;
   323→
   324→    // Avg deal size (closed won)
   325→    const wonValues = closedWon.map(o => o.deal_value || 0).filter(v => v > 0);
   326→    const avgDealSize = wonValues.length > 0 ? wonValues.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / wonValues.length : 0;
   327→
   328→    // Avg close time (days from created_at to closed_at for won deals)
   329→    const closeTimes = closedWon
   330→      .filter(o => o.created_at && o.closed_at)
   331→      .map(o => (new Date(o.closed_at!).getTime() - new Date(o.created_at).getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
   332→    const avgCloseTime = closeTimes.length > 0 ? closeTimes.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / closeTimes.length : 0;
   333→
   334→    // Qualified % = bucket A + B / total
   335→    const qualifiedCount = all.filter(o => o.bucket === 'A' || o.bucket === 'B').length;
   336→    const qualifiedPct = all.length > 0 ? (qualifiedCount / all.length) * 100 : 0;
   337→
   338→    // Bucket A %
   339→    const bucketAPct = all.length > 0 ? (all.filter(o => o.bucket === 'A').length / all.length) * 100 : 0;
   340→
   341→    // Pipeline value (active)
   342→    const pipelineValue = pipelineActive.reduce((sum, o) => sum + (o.deal_value || 0), 0);
   343→
   344→    // Overdue follow-ups
   345→    const now = new Date().toISOString();
   346→    const overdueFollowups = pipelineActive.filter(o =>
   347→      o.next_meeting_at && o.next_meeting_at < now
   348→    ).length;
   349→
   350→    // Proposals sent
   351→    const proposalsSent = all.filter(o =>
   352→      ['proposal_call', 'v2_contract', 'v2_closed_won'].includes(o.stage)
   353→    ).length;
   354→
   355→    // Alert metrics for manager cards
   356→    const nowDate = new Date();

   358→    const weekEnd = new Date(todayStart.getTime() + 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000);
   359→    const meetingsThisWeek = pipelineActive.filter(o =>

   361→    ).length;
   362→    const meetingsToday = pipelineActive.filter(o =>

   364→    ).length;
   365→
   366→    // Stale deals: active pipeline deals with no contact in 7+ days
   367→    const staleDeals = pipelineActive.filter(o => {
   368→      const lastDate = o.last_contacted_at || o.last_bump_date || o.created_at;
   369→      if (!lastDate) return true;

   371→      return daysSince >= 7;

   385→      discovery_done: 0.4, proposal_call: 0.7, v2_contract: 0.9,
   386→    };
   387→    const weightedPipeline = pipelineActive.reduce((sum, o) => sum + (o.deal_value || 0) * (stageProbability[o.stage] || 0.1), 0);

   391→    const stageOrder: Record<string, number> = {};

**Full Templates Tab Structure:**

```typescript
// Lines 5367-5652: Complete Templates Tab
<TabsContent value="templates" className="mt-0">
  {(() => {
    const TEMPLATE_STAGES = [
      { value: 'all', label: 'All' },
      { value: 'cold_dm', label: 'Cold DM' },
      { value: 'warm', label: 'Warm' },
      { value: 'tg_intro', label: 'TG Intro' },
      { value: 'booked', label: 'Booked' },
      { value: 'discovery_done', label: 'Discovery Done' },
      { value: 'proposal_call', label: 'Proposal Call' },
      { value: 'v2_contract', label: 'Contract' },
      { value: 'bump', label: 'Bumps' },
    ];

    // Lines 5381-5383: Filter templates by stage
    const filteredTemplates = templateStageFilter === 'all'
      ? templates
      : templates.filter(t => t.stage === templateStageFilter);

    // Helper functions (Lines 5385-5406)
    const getSubTypeLabel = (subType: string) => {
      const labels: Record<string, string> = {
        general: 'General',
        initial: 'Initial',
        bump_1: 'Bump 1',
        bump_2: 'Bump 2',
        bump_3: 'Bump 3',
        follow_up: 'Follow-up',
      };
      return labels[subType] || subType;
    };

    // Copy handler (Lines 5408-5410)
    const handleCopy = async (content: string) => {
      await navigator.clipboard.writeText(content);
    };

    // Create template handler (Lines 5412-5424)
    const handleCreateTemplate = async () => {
      setIsTemplateSubmitting(true);
      try {
        const created = await SalesPipelineService.createTemplate(templateForm);
        setTemplates(prev => [...prev, created]);
        setIsTemplateDialogOpen(false);
        setTemplateForm({ name: '', stage: 'cold_dm', sub_type: 'general', content: '' });
      } catch (err) {
        console.error('Error creating template:', err);
      } finally {
        setIsTemplateSubmitting(false);
      }
    };

    // Update template handler (Lines 5426-5440)
    const handleUpdateTemplate = async () => {
      if (!editingTemplate) return;
      setIsTemplateSubmitting(true);
      try {
        const updated = await SalesPipelineService.updateTemplate(editingTemplate.id, templateForm);
        setTemplates(prev => prev.map(t => t.id === updated.id ? updated : t));
        setEditingTemplate(null);
        setIsTemplateDialogOpen(false);
        setTemplateForm({ name: '', stage: 'cold_dm', sub_type: 'general', content: '' });
      } catch (err) {
        console.error('Error updating template:', err);
      } finally {
        setIsTemplateSubmitting(false);
      }
    };

    // Delete template handler (Lines 5442-5449)
    const handleDeleteTemplate = async (id: string) => {
      try {
        await SalesPipelineService.deleteTemplate(id);
        setTemplates(prev => prev.filter(t => t.id !== id));
      } catch (err) {
        console.error('Error deleting template:', err);
      }
    };

    // Edit/Create dialog openers (Lines 5451-5461)
    const openEditDialog = (t: SalesDmTemplate) => {
      setEditingTemplate(t);
      setTemplateForm({ name: t.name, stage: t.stage, sub_type: t.sub_type, content: t.content, variables: t.variables });
      setIsTemplateDialogOpen(true);
    };

    const openCreateDialog = () => {
      setEditingTemplate(null);
      setTemplateForm({ name: '', stage: 'cold_dm', sub_type: 'general', content: '' });
      setIsTemplateDialogOpen(true);
    };

    // Sub-type options by stage (Lines 5463-5466)
    const getSubTypeOptions = (stage: string) => {
      if (stage === 'bump') return ['bump_1', 'bump_2', 'bump_3'];
      return ['general', 'initial', 'follow_up'];
    };

    return (
      <div className="space-y-4">
        {/* Stage filter pills + New button (Lines 5469-5491) */}
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 flex-wrap">
            {TEMPLATE_STAGES.map(s => (
              <button
                key={s.value}
                onClick={() => setTemplateStageFilter(s.value)}
                className={`px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full text-sm font-medium transition-colors ${
                  templateStageFilter === s.value
                    ? 'bg-[#3e8692] text-white'
                    : 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-200'
                }`}
              >
                {s.label}
              </button>
            ))}
          </div>
          <Button size="sm" onClick={openCreateDialog} style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692' }} className="text-white hover:opacity-90">
            <Plus className="h-4 w-4 mr-1" />
            New Template
          </Button>
        </div>

        {/* Template cards grid (Lines 5493-5561) */}
        {filteredTemplates.length === 0 ? (
          <div className="text-center py-12 text-gray-500">
            <FileText className="h-8 w-8 mx-auto mb-2 opacity-50" />
            <p>No templates found{templateStageFilter !== 'all' ? ' for this stage' : ''}.</p>
          </div>
        ) : (
          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
            {filteredTemplates.map(t => {
              const stageColor = getStageColorForTemplate(t.stage);
              return (
                <Card key={t.id} className="overflow-hidden">
                  <CardContent className="p-4 space-y-3">
                    {/* Header with title and action buttons (Lines 5506-5537) */}
                    <div className="flex items-start justify-between">
                      <h4 className="font-semibold text-sm text-gray-900 line-clamp-1">{t.name}</h4>
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-1 ml-2 flex-shrink-0">
                        {/* Copy button (Lines 5509-5517) */}
                        <Button
                          variant="ghost"
                          size="sm"
                          className="h-7 w-7 p-0"
                          onClick={() => handleCopy(t.content)}
                          title="Copy to clipboard"
                        >
                          <Copy className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
                        </Button>
                        {/* Edit button (Lines 5518-5526) */}
                        <Button
                          variant="ghost"
                          size="sm"
                          className="h-7 w-7 p-0"
                          onClick={() => openEditDialog(t)}
                          title="Edit"
                        >
                          <Edit className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
                        </Button>
                        {/* Delete button (Lines 5527-5535) */}
                        <Button
                          variant="ghost"
                          size="sm"
                          className="h-7 w-7 p-0 text-red-500 hover:text-red-700"
                          onClick={() => handleDeleteTemplate(t.id)}
                          title="Delete"
                        >
                          <Trash2 className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
                        </Button>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                    {/* Stage and Sub-type badges (Lines 5538-5545) */}
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                      <Badge className={`${stageColor.bg} ${stageColor.text} text-xs border-0`}>
                        {getStageLabelForTemplate(t.stage)}
                      </Badge>
                      <Badge variant="outline" className="text-xs">
                        {getSubTypeLabel(t.sub_type)}
                      </Badge>
                    </div>
                    {/* Template content preview (Lines 5546-5546) */}
                    <p className="text-sm text-gray-600 line-clamp-4 whitespace-pre-wrap">{t.content}</p>
                    {/* Variables display (Lines 5547-5555) */}
                    {t.variables && t.variables.length > 0 && (
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-1 flex-wrap">
                        {t.variables.map(v => (
                          <span key={v} className="text-[10px] bg-blue-50 text-blue-600 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded font-mono">
                            [{v}]
                          </span>
                        ))}
                      </div>
                    )}
                  </CardContent>
                </Card>
              );
            })}
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Create/Edit Template Dialog (Lines 5563-5648) */}
        <Dialog open={isTemplateDialogOpen} onOpenChange={(open) => {
          setIsTemplateDialogOpen(open);
          if (!open) { setEditingTemplate(null); setTemplateForm({ name: '', stage: 'cold_dm', sub_type: 'general', content: '' }); }
        }}>
          <DialogContent className="sm:max-w-lg">
            <DialogHeader>
              <DialogTitle>{editingTemplate ? 'Edit Template' : 'New Template'}</DialogTitle>
              <DialogDescription>
                {editingTemplate ? 'Update this sales DM template.' : 'Create a new stage-specific DM template.'}
              </DialogDescription>
            </DialogHeader>
            <div className="space-y-4">
              <div>
                <Label>Name</Label>
                <Input
                  value={templateForm.name}
                  onChange={e => setTemplateForm(prev => ({ ...prev, name: e.target.value }))}
                  placeholder="e.g., Cold DM — Initial Outreach"
                  className="auth-input"
                />
              </div>
              <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                <div>
                  <Label>Stage</Label>
                  <Select
                    value={templateForm.stage}
                    onValueChange={v => setTemplateForm(prev => ({
                      ...prev,
                      stage: v,
                      sub_type: v === 'bump' ? 'bump_1' : 'general',
                    }))}
                  >
                    <SelectTrigger className="auth-input"><SelectValue /></SelectTrigger>
                    <SelectContent>
                      <SelectItem value="cold_dm">Cold DM</SelectItem>
                      <SelectItem value="warm">Warm</SelectItem>
                      <SelectItem value="tg_intro">TG Intro</SelectItem>
                      <SelectItem value="booked">Booked</SelectItem>
                      <SelectItem value="discovery_done">Discovery Done</SelectItem>
                      <SelectItem value="proposal_call">Proposal Call</SelectItem>
                      <SelectItem value="v2_contract">Contract</SelectItem>
                      <SelectItem value="bump">Bump</SelectItem>
                    </SelectContent>
                  </Select>
                </div>
                <div>
                  <Label>Sub-type</Label>
                  <Select
                    value={templateForm.sub_type || 'general'}
                    onValueChange={v => setTemplateForm(prev => ({ ...prev, sub_type: v }))}
                  >
                    <SelectTrigger className="auth-input"><SelectValue /></SelectTrigger>
                    <SelectContent>
                      {getSubTypeOptions(templateForm.stage).map(opt => (
                        <SelectItem key={opt} value={opt}>{getSubTypeLabel(opt)}</SelectItem>
                      ))}
                    </SelectContent>
                  </Select>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div>
                <Label>Content</Label>
                <Textarea
                  value={templateForm.content}
                  onChange={e => setTemplateForm(prev => ({ ...prev, content: e.target.value }))}
                  placeholder="Write your template here... Use [KOL_NAME], [PROJECT_NAME], etc. as placeholders."
                  rows={6}
                  className="auth-input"
                />
              </div>
            </div>
            <DialogFooter>
              <Button variant="outline" onClick={() => setIsTemplateDialogOpen(false)}>Cancel</Button>
              <Button
                onClick={editingTemplate ? handleUpdateTemplate : handleCreateTemplate}
                disabled={isTemplateSubmitting || !templateForm.name || !templateForm.content}
                style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692' }}
                className="text-white hover:opacity-90"
              >
                {isTemplateSubmitting ? <Loader2 className="h-4 w-4 animate-spin mr-2" /> : null}
                {editingTemplate ? 'Save Changes' : 'Create Template'}
              </Button>
            </DialogFooter>
          </DialogContent>
        </Dialog>
      </div>
    );
  })()}
</TabsContent>

export interface SalesDmTemplate {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  stage: string;
  sub_type: string;
  content: string;
  variables: string[];
  is_active: boolean;
  created_by: string | null;
  created_at: string;
  updated_at: string;
}

export interface CreateSalesDmTemplateData {
  name: string;
  stage: string;
  sub_type?: string;
  content: string;
  variables?: string[];
}

### 3. SalesPipelineService Template Methods (Lines 685-735)

```typescript
// Lines 685-698: Get all active templates
static async getTemplates(): Promise<SalesDmTemplate[]> {
  const { data, error } = await supabase
    .from('sales_dm_templates')
    .select('*')
    .eq('is_active', true)
    .order('stage', { ascending: true })
    .order('sub_type', { ascending: true });

  if (error) {
    console.error('Error fetching sales DM templates:', error);
    throw error;
  }
  return (data || []) as SalesDmTemplate[];
}

// Lines 700-714: Create new template
static async createTemplate(templateData: CreateSalesDmTemplateData): Promise<SalesDmTemplate> {
  const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser();

  const { data, error } = await supabase
    .from('sales_dm_templates')
    .insert([{
      ...templateData,
      created_by: user?.id || null,
    }])
    .select()
    .single();

  if (error) throw error;
  return data as SalesDmTemplate;
}

// Lines 716-726: Update template
static async updateTemplate(id: string, updates: Partial<CreateSalesDmTemplateData>): Promise<SalesDmTemplate> {
  const { data, error } = await supabase
    .from('sales_dm_templates')
    .update({ ...updates, updated_at: new Date().toISOString() })
    .eq('id', id)
    .select()
    .single();

  if (error) throw error;
  return data as SalesDmTemplate;
}

// Lines 728-735: Delete template
static async deleteTemplate(id: string): Promise<void> {
  const { error } = await supabase
    .from('sales_dm_templates')
    .delete()
    .eq('id', id);

  if (error) throw error;
}
```

**File:** `/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/lib/salesPipelineService.ts`

The page has several established dialog patterns you can model a preview modal after:

const renderOrbitPrompt = () => (
  <Dialog open={!!orbitPrompt} onOpenChange={open => { if (!open) setOrbitPrompt(null); }}>
    <DialogContent className="sm:max-w-sm z-[80]">
      <DialogHeader>
        <DialogTitle>Move to Orbit</DialogTitle>

      </DialogHeader>
      {/* Content */}

      </DialogFooter>
    </DialogContent>
  </Dialog>
);
```

**Pattern 2: Modal with Popover/Combobox (Lines 4593-4685 - Closed Won Prompt)**
- Uses `Popover`, `Command`, `CommandInput`, `CommandList` for complex selection
- Shows both "new" and "existing" modes

**Pattern 3: Required State Structure for Preview Modal:**

} | null>(null);

      </div>
      <DialogFooter>

      </DialogFooter>
    </DialogContent>
  </Dialog>
);
```
